spl_product_data_elements: CLEAR ANTI ITCH pramoxine hcl, zinc acetate lotion SODIUM CITRATE PRAMOXINE HCL PRAMOXINE CITRIC ACID MONOHYDRATE ROSMARINUS OFFICINALIS (ROSEMARY) LEAF OIL HYPROMELLOSE, UNSPECIFIED LAVANDULA ANGUSTIFOLIA (LAVENDER) OIL WATER CAMPHOR (NATURAL) ALCOHOL BENZOIC ACID GLYCERIN POLYSORBATE 40 ZINC ACETATE ZINC CATION
active_ingredient: Active ingredients Pramoxine HCl 1% Zinc acetate 0.1%
indications_and_usage: Uses for the temporary relief of pain and itching associated with minor skin irritations and rashes due to poison ivy, poison oak or poison sumac dries the oozing and weeping of poison: ■ ivy ■ oak ■ sumac
when_using: When using this product do not get into eyes
stop_use: Stop use and ask a doctor if condition worsens symptoms last more than 7 days or clear up and occur again within a few days
keep_out_of_reach_of_children: Keep out of reach of children. If swallowed, get medical help or contact a Poison Control Center right away.
dosage_and_administration: Directions shake well before applying wash affected area of skin adults and children 2 years of age and older: apply to affected area not more than 3 to 4 times daily children under 2 years: ask a doctor
storage_and_handling: Other information store at room temperature 59°-77°F (15°–25°C)
inactive_ingredient: Inactive ingredients alcohol, benzoic acid, camphor, citric acid, fragrance, glycerin, hydroxypropyl methylcellulose, Lavandula angustifolia (lavender) oil, polysorbate 40, Rosmarinus officinalis (rosemary) leaf oil, sodium citrate, water
spl_unclassified_section: Disclaimer *This product is not manufactured or distributed by Bausch Health US, LLC, distributor of Caladryl ® Clear ® Lotion.
adverse_reactions: Adverse Reaction MADE WITH PRIDE & CARE FOR H-E-B ® SAN ANTONIO, TX 78204
package_label_principal_display_panel: Principal Display Panel Compare to Caladryl ® Clear ® * H-E-B ® Clear Anti-Itch Lotion External Analgesic/Skin Protectant Relieves pain & itching caused by: poison ivy, poison sumanc, poison oak, and insect bites Dries Clear 6 FL OZ (177 mL) mm01
